# Concierge — Executive Lounge

> Market, DeFi, and security intelligence. Pay per query via x402 (MPP-discoverable on mppscan.com) — no API keys, no subscriptions.

## Docs

- [Welcome to Concierge](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs): Introduction, endpoint map, standard response shapes.
- [For Builders](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/builders): Integrate Concierge — OpenAPI, AgentCash, code examples, 21 paid routes.
- [Quickstart](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/quickstart): First paid API call in under two minutes.
- [Pricing](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/pricing): Pay-per-query USDC pricing for all routes.
- [x402 Protocol](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/payment/x402): HTTP 402, PAYMENT-SIGNATURE, Solana and Base USDC.
- [MPP & AgentCash](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/payment/mpp): MPPscan listing, 21 paid routes, agentcash add install.
- [Poncho](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/integration/poncho): Conversational agent marketplace — macro, wire, intel via x402 (no API key).
- [pay.sh](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/payment/paysh): pay CLI catalog — sandbox curl, Claude/Codex MCP, pay-skills listing.
- [Grok Build](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/grok-build): x.ai/cli terminal agent — concierge-intel + concierge-security skills, pay.sh x402 probes.
- [Corbits](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/corbits): Optional Marketplace proxy · pay.sh primary catalog · PayAI settlement (ABK hosted wind-down Jun 2026).
- [Security Desk](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/api/security): Passive website scan, scout audits, free conc-exe.xyz self-audit — Lounge /lounge#security-scan
- [Agent Skills](https://conc-exe.xyz/agent/skills): concierge-intel + concierge-security SKILL.md — raw at /skills/
- [Agent Skill (SKILL.md)](https://conc-exe.xyz/skills/concierge-intel/SKILL.md): Agent Skills pattern for Claude/Cursor/Grok sessions
- [Official MCP Registry](https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/?search=xyz.conc-exe%2Fconcierge-intel): Published xyz.conc-exe/concierge-intel v1.1.0 — guide at /docs/integration/mcp-registry
- [Agent SDK](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/sdk/agent): @conc-exe/agent — discover → pay → call intel/security from TypeScript agents
- [Agent Readiness](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/api/agent-readiness): Audit posture, distribution phase 2, verify commands
- [API Overview](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/api/overview): Base URL, discovery, verdict signal vocabulary.
- [HYRE Gateway](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/integration/hyre): Optional DeepSeek / GLM chat models via OpenAI-compatible gateway.
- [Anthropic Claude](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/integration/anthropic): Optional Claude Sonnet / Haiku chat models via Messages API.
- [OpenAI GPT-5.6](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/integration/openai): Optional Terra / Luna chat models — x402 USDC or TCX per turn.
- [Concierge Chat](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/api/concierge): POST /api/concierge — Gemini (default), GLM, HYRE, Claude, or GPT-5.6 chat, enhance, image.
- [DeFi Intel](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/api/intel): TVL, yields, macro, wire, whales, wallet, verdict, alpha desks.
- [Agent Identity](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/api/agent-identity): agt_ registry, agent cards, X-Agent-Id.
- [Lounge & Signals](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/api/lounge): Market feed, RWA signals, news unlock.
- [Executive Lounge](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/playground): Browser terminal and wallet UX.
- [Concierge Agent home](https://conc-exe.xyz/agent): Hero hub — market intelligence and Security Desk as a service.
- [API Playground](https://conc-exe.xyz/agent/playground): Probe x402 402 challenges live.
- [Discover](https://conc-exe.xyz/agent/discover): x402 + MPP fan-out, OpenAPI, MCP Registry, agent cards. List on [MPPscan](https://www.mppscan.com/register).
- [Architecture](https://conc-exe.xyz/docs/architecture): Edge APIs, data sources, configuration.
- [TCX Token](https://conc-exe.xyz/token): Tokenomics — live on Pump.fun · CA F2bnJW1z55UQ9ZqGX5RwYQfvNJrd23n66eyBV5QZpump · pay-per-call utility.
- [TCX Transparency](https://conc-exe.xyz/token/transparency): Weekly buyback and burn reports.
- [TCX Stake](https://conc-exe.xyz/token/stake): Staking & protocol rewards preview — ships after first buyback window (coming soon).
- [Security Desk](https://conc-exe.xyz/lounge#security-scan): Passive website scan with LLM security verdict for Concierge AI context.

## OpenAPI

- [openapi.json](https://conc-exe.xyz/openapi.json)
- [/.well-known/x402](https://conc-exe.xyz/.well-known/x402)
- [/.well-known/api-catalog](https://conc-exe.xyz/.well-known/api-catalog): RFC 9727 linkset — OpenAPI, MCP, x402, agent card
- [asyncapi.json](https://conc-exe.xyz/asyncapi.json): Event contract stub (HTTP-only today)
- [/.well-known/agent-card.json](https://conc-exe.xyz/.well-known/agent-card.json)
